completed_slice: Added a non-deploying GitHub Actions preflight that converts current Cloudflare environment readiness into a redacted, retained authorization packet.
verification: GitHub accepted both additive commits; referenced authorization builder tests were inspected. No workflow run or Cloudflare deployment is claimed.
remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN plus an observed successful preflight and production workflow run.
next_action: Dispatch cloudflare-pages-authorization-preflight.yml, retain its run and artifact evidence, resolve only the named blockers, then dispatch cloudflare-pages-research.yml.
